---
title: "aim1_crosssectional"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

# Load packages and data
```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))

predictors_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
diagnosis <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_diagnosis.rds"))
```


# Get last measured biomarkers
```{r}
ptau217_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ptau217)) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Date_taken, age, ptau217) %>%
  slice_tail() 

other_biomarkers_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  select(-ptau217) %>%
  filter_at(vars(-CONP_ID), all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  slice_tail() 

all_dat <- predictors_dat %>% 
  left_join((ptau217_last %>%
               select(CONP_ID, ptau217)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(other_biomarkers_last, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(gfap_log = log(gfap),
         nfl_log = log(nfl),
         ptau181_log = log(ptau181),
         ptau217_log = log(ptau217),
         ptau231_sqrt = sqrt(ptau231)) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var="CONP_ID")

all_dat_longer <- all_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = BIOMARKERS,
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "measure"
  ) %>%
  # mutate(measure_norm = if_else(biomarker == "ab_ratio", measure, log(measure)))
  mutate(measure_norm = case_when(
    biomarker == "ab_ratio" ~ measure,
    #biomarker == "gfap" ~ sqrt(measure),
    #
    biomarker == "ptau231" ~ sqrt(measure),
    #biomarker == "ptau217" ~ sign(measure) * abs(measure)^(1/3),
    #biomarker != "ab_ratio" | biomarker != "ptau231" ~ ,
    TRUE ~ log(measure)))
```


# Regression - All Models (APOE)
```{r}
e2_dat <- all_dat %>% filter(apoe == "e2+")
e3_dat <- all_dat %>% filter(apoe == "e3/e3")
e4_dat <- all_dat %>% filter(apoe == "e4+")
```

```{r}
outcomes <- c("ab_ratio", "gfap_log", "nfl_log", "ptau181_log", "ptau217_log", "ptau231_sqrt")
apoe_dat <- list(
  "e2+" = e2_dat, 
  "e3/e3" = e3_dat, 
  "e4+" = e4_dat)

models <- tribble(~model, ~predictors,
                  "model0", "age + sex + BMI",
                  "model1", "age + sex + BMI + GRS",
                  "model2", "age + sex + BMI + GRS + family_history",
                  "model3", "age + sex + BMI + GRS + family_history + score_libra2",
                  "model4", "age + sex + BMI + GRS + family_history + score_cogd",
                  "model5", "age + sex + BMI + GRS + family_history + score_cogd + score_libra2") 

apoe_preventad <- expand_grid(
  apoe_group = names(apoe_dat),
  outcome = outcomes,
  models
) %>%
  mutate(
    data_to_use = map(apoe_group, ~apoe_dat[[.]]),
    eq = glue("{outcome} ~ {predictors}"),
    res = map2(eq, data_to_use, ~lm(as.formula(.x), data = .y)),
    dataf = map(res, tidy),
    mod = map(res, glance)
  )

#apoe_preventad
```


# Results
```{r}
res_apoe_preventad <- bind_rows(
  select(apoe_preventad, apoe_group, model, outcome, dataf)
) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  # Filter for specific terms of interest
  filter(
    str_detect(term, '^GRS|^family_history|^score_libra2|^score_cogd|^age|^sex|^BMI')
  ) %>%
  # Note: APOE terms removed since we're stratifying by APOE
  arrange(apoe_group, outcome, term, estimate) %>%
  mutate(
    # Significance flag
    sig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, TRUE, FALSE),
    
    # Confidence intervals
    conf.low = estimate - (std.error * 1.96),
    conf.high = estimate + (std.error * 1.96),
    
    # Transformation detection
    transformation = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ "log",
      str_detect(outcome, "_sqrt$") ~ "sqrt",
      TRUE ~ "none"
    ),
    
    # Exponentiated values (for log-transformed outcomes - % change interpretation)
    exp_est = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(estimate),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_lci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(conf.low),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_uci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(conf.high),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pct_change = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ (exp_est - 1) * 100,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Result category
    res = case_when(
      sig == TRUE ~ "Significant",
      sig == FALSE ~ "Not Significant"
    ),
    
    # Significance stars
    stars = case_when(
      p.value >= 0.05 ~ "", 
      p.value >= 0.01 & p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      p.value >= 0.001 & p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***"
    ),
    
    # Categorize predictors
    category = case_when(
      term == "age" ~ "Demographics",
      term %in% c("sexMale", "sex", "sexFemale") ~ "Demographics",
      term == "BMI" ~ "Demographics",
      term == "GRS" ~ "Genetics",
      str_detect(term, "^family_history") ~ "Family History",
      term == "score_libra2" ~ "LIBRA2",
      term == "score_cogd" ~ "CogDrisk",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    
    # Clean outcome labels
    outcome_label = case_when(
      outcome == "ab_ratio" ~ "Aβ42/40 Ratio",
      outcome == "gfap_log" ~ "GFAP",
      outcome == "nfl_log" ~ "NfL",
      outcome == "ptau181_log" ~ "P-tau181",
      outcome == "ptau217_log" ~ "P-tau217",
      outcome == "ptau231_sqrt" ~ "P-tau231",
      TRUE ~ outcome
    ),
    
    # Clean term labels
    term_label = case_when(
      term == "age" ~ "Age (years)",
      term %in% c("sexMale", "sexFemale") ~ "Sex",
      term == "BMI" ~ "BMI",
      term == "GRS" ~ "Genetic Risk Score",
      str_detect(term, "^family_history") ~ "Family History",
      term == "score_libra2" ~ "LIBRA2 Score",
      term == "score_cogd" ~ "CogDRISK Score",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  ) %>%
  # Round numeric values
  mutate(across(c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, 
                  conf.low, conf.high, exp_est, exp_lci, exp_uci, pct_change), 
                ~round(., digits = 3)))
res_apoe_preventad
```

```{r}
res_table <- res_apoe_preventad %>% 
  filter(model == "model0") %>%
  filter(apoe_group == "e4+") %>%
  select(outcome, model, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, stars) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = outcome,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_from = c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, stars)
  ) %>%
  select(-model) %>%
  gt() %>% 
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**AB42/40**"),
    columns = ends_with("ab_ratio")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**GFAP**"),
    columns = ends_with("gfap_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**NfL**"),
    columns = ends_with("nfl_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau181**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau181_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau217**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau217_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau231**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau231_sqrt")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    starts_with("estimate")~ md("*Beta*"),
    starts_with("std.error")~ md("*SE*"),
    starts_with("statistic")~md("*Statistic*"),
    starts_with("p.value")~ md("*p.value*"),
    starts_with("stars")~""
  )
res_table

gtsave(res_table, 
       vwidth = 2000,
       filename = "PREVENTAD_model0_e4.png", 
       path = AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables)
```


# Plot
```{r}
color_palette <- c(
  "Demographics" = "#999999",
  "Genetics" = "#E41A1C",
  "Family History" = "#377EB8",
  "LIBRA2" = "#4DAF4A",
  "CogDrisk" = "#984EA3"
)

# Create the forest plot
plot1 <- ggplot(
  res_apoe_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "model5") %>%  
    filter(apoe_group == "e4+") %>%
    select(-apoe_group) %>%
    # Factor sig for ordering
    mutate(sig = factor(sig, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE))) %>%
  
    mutate(term = factor(term,
                         levels=c("score_cogd", "score_libra2",
                                  "family_history2+ FDR + ext", "family_history2+ FDR", "family_history1 FDR + ext",
                                  "GRS", "BMI", "sexMale", "age"))) %>%
    mutate(term = fct_recode(term,
                             "Age" = "age",
                             "Sex (Male vs Female)" = "sexMale",
                             "1 FDR + ext" = "family_history1 FDR + ext",
                             "2+ FDR" = "family_history2+ FDR" ,
                             "2+ FDR + ext" = "family_history2+ FDR + ext",
                             "CogDrisk" = "score_cogd",
                             "LIBRA2" = "score_libra2")) %>%
    # Order categories
    mutate(category = factor(category, levels = names(color_palette))),
  aes(y = term, x = estimate, group = category,
      xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = category)
) +
  #geom_point(aes(size = sig), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(linewidth = sig), 
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  scale_size_manual(
    values = c(`FALSE` = 0.75, `TRUE` = 1.75),
    labels = c(`FALSE` = "Not Significant", `TRUE` = "Significant"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  # scale_color_jama() +
  scale_color_jama(name = "Predictor Category") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Beta (95% CI)",
    y = "Predictor",
    title = "Model: Biomarker ~ Demographics + CRS + GRS + Family History",
    subtitle = "APOE e4+ Category"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, angle = 0, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )
plot1
ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_model5_e4.png"), 
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

# Residuals plot
```{r}
model_data <- apoe_preventad %>%
  filter(model == "model5") %>%
  filter(apoe_group == "e4+") %>%
  mutate(
    residuals = map(res, residuals),
    fitted = map(res, fitted)
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, residuals, fitted) %>%
  unnest(c(residuals, fitted))
  
# Histogram
p_hist <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = residuals)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Residuals",
       x = "Residuals", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
  
# Q-Q plot
p_qq <- ggplot(model_data, aes(sample = residuals)) +
  stat_qq(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  stat_qq_line(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Q-Q Plot",
       x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
  
# Residuals vs Fitted
p_fitted <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8, method = "loess") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted Values",
       x = "Fitted Values", y = "Residuals") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# Stack vertically
combined <- p_hist / p_qq / p_fitted +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Model: Biomarker ~ Demographics + Genetics + Family History + CRS",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save
ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$stratified, "PREVENTAD_diagnostics_model5_e4.png"), 
       combined, width = 14, height = 14, dpi = 300)
```


# Regression - All Models (GRS tertiles)
```{r}
all_dat1 <- all_dat %>%
  mutate(GRS_tertile = ntile(GRS, 3))

high_grs_dat <- all_dat1 %>% filter(GRS_tertile == 3)
mid_grs_dat <- all_dat1 %>% filter(GRS_tertile == 2)
low_grs_dat <- all_dat1 %>% filter(GRS_tertile == 1)
```

```{r}
grs_dat <- list(
  "High GRS" = high_grs_dat, 
  "Moderate GRS" = mid_grs_dat, 
  "Low GRS" = low_grs_dat)

models <- tribble(~model, ~predictors,
                  "model0", "age + sex + BMI",
                  "model1", "age + sex + BMI + apoe",
                  "model2", "age + sex + BMI + apoe + family_history",
                  "model3", "age + sex + BMI + apoe + family_history + score_libra2",
                  "model4", "age + sex + BMI + apoe + family_history + score_cogd",
                  "model5", "age + sex + BMI + apoe + family_history + score_cogd + score_libra2") 

grs_preventad <- expand_grid(
  grs_group = names(grs_dat),
  outcome = outcomes,
  models
) %>%
  mutate(
    data_to_use = map(grs_group, ~grs_dat[[.]]),
    eq = glue("{outcome} ~ {predictors}"),
    res = map2(eq, data_to_use, ~lm(as.formula(.x), data = .y)),
    dataf = map(res, tidy),
    mod = map(res, glance)
  )

# grs_preventad
```


# Results
```{r}
res_grs_preventad <- bind_rows(
  select(grs_preventad, grs_group, model, outcome, dataf)
) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  # Filter for specific terms of interest
  filter(
    str_detect(term, '^apoe|^family_history|^score_libra2|^score_cogd|^age|^sex|^BMI')
  ) %>%
  # Note: APOE terms removed since we're stratifying by APOE
  arrange(grs_group, outcome, term, estimate) %>%
  mutate(
    # Significance flag
    sig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, TRUE, FALSE),
    
    # Confidence intervals
    conf.low = estimate - (std.error * 1.96),
    conf.high = estimate + (std.error * 1.96),
    
    # Transformation detection
    transformation = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ "log",
      str_detect(outcome, "_sqrt$") ~ "sqrt",
      TRUE ~ "none"
    ),
    
    # Exponentiated values (for log-transformed outcomes - % change interpretation)
    exp_est = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(estimate),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_lci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(conf.low),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_uci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ exp(conf.high),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pct_change = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log$") ~ (exp_est - 1) * 100,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Result category
    res = case_when(
      sig == TRUE ~ "Significant",
      sig == FALSE ~ "Not Significant"
    ),
    
    # Significance stars
    stars = case_when(
      p.value >= 0.05 ~ "", 
      p.value >= 0.01 & p.value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      p.value >= 0.001 & p.value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***"
    ),
    
    # Categorize predictors
    category = case_when(
      term == "age" ~ "Demographics",
      term %in% c("sexMale", "sex", "sexFemale") ~ "Demographics",
      term == "BMI" ~ "Demographics",
      str_detect(term, "apoe") ~ "APOE",
      str_detect(term, "^family_history") ~ "Family History",
      term == "score_libra2" ~ "LIBRA2",
      term == "score_cogd" ~ "CogDrisk",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    
    # Clean outcome labels
    outcome_label = case_when(
      outcome == "ab_ratio" ~ "Aβ42/40 Ratio",
      outcome == "gfap_log" ~ "GFAP",
      outcome == "nfl_log" ~ "NfL",
      outcome == "ptau181_log" ~ "P-tau181",
      outcome == "ptau217_log" ~ "P-tau217",
      outcome == "ptau231_sqrt" ~ "P-tau231",
      TRUE ~ outcome
    ),
    
    # Clean term labels
    term_label = case_when(
      term == "age" ~ "Age (years)",
      term %in% c("sexMale", "sexFemale") ~ "Sex",
      term == "BMI" ~ "BMI",
      term == "apoe" ~ "APOE",
      str_detect(term, "^family_history") ~ "Family History",
      term == "score_libra2" ~ "LIBRA2 Score",
      term == "score_cogd" ~ "CogDRISK Score",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  ) %>%
  # Round numeric values
  mutate(across(c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, 
                  conf.low, conf.high, exp_est, exp_lci, exp_uci, pct_change), 
                ~round(., digits = 3)))
```


```{r}
res_table <- res_grs_preventad %>% 
  filter(model == "model5") %>%
  filter(grs_group == "High GRS") %>%
  select(outcome, model, term, estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, stars) %>% 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = outcome,
    names_sep = "_",
    values_from = c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, stars)
  ) %>%
  select(-model) %>%
  gt() %>% 
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**AB42/40**"),
    columns = ends_with("ab_ratio")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**GFAP**"),
    columns = ends_with("gfap_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**NfL**"),
    columns = ends_with("nfl_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau181**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau181_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau217**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau217_log")
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = md("**ptau231**"),
    columns = ends_with("ptau231_sqrt")
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    starts_with("estimate")~ md("*Beta*"),
    starts_with("std.error")~ md("*SE*"),
    starts_with("statistic")~md("*Statistic*"),
    starts_with("p.value")~ md("*p.value*"),
    starts_with("stars")~""
  )
res_table

gtsave(res_table, 
       vwidth = 2000,
       filename = "PREVENTAD_model5_highgrs.png", 
       path = AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$tables)
```


# Plot
```{r}
color_palette <- c(
  "Demographics" = "#999999",
  "APOE" = "#E41A1C",
  "Family History" = "#377EB8",
  "LIBRA2" = "#4DAF4A",
  "CogDrisk" = "#984EA3"
)

# Create the forest plot
plot1 <- ggplot(
  res_grs_preventad %>%
    filter(model == "model5") %>%  
    filter(grs_group == "High GRS") %>%
    select(-grs_group) %>%
    # Factor sig for ordering
    mutate(sig = factor(sig, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE))) %>%
  
    mutate(term = factor(term,
                         levels=c("score_cogd", "score_libra2",
                                  "family_history2+ FDR + ext", "family_history2+ FDR", "family_history1 FDR + ext",
                                  "apoee4+", "apoee2+", "BMI", "sexMale", "age"))) %>%
    mutate(term = fct_recode(term,
                             "Age" = "age",
                             "Sex (Male vs Female)" = "sexMale",
                             "APOE e4+" = "apoee4+",
                             "APOE e2+" = "apoee2+",
                             "1 FDR + ext" = "family_history1 FDR + ext",
                             "2+ FDR" = "family_history2+ FDR" ,
                             "2+ FDR + ext" = "family_history2+ FDR + ext",
                             "CogDrisk" = "score_cogd",
                             "LIBRA2" = "score_libra2")) %>%
    # Order categories
    mutate(category = factor(category, levels = names(color_palette))),
  aes(y = term, x = estimate, group = category,
      xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, color = category)
) +
  #geom_point(aes(size = sig), position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(linewidth = sig), 
                 position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  scale_size_manual(
    values = c(`FALSE` = 0.75, `TRUE` = 1.75),
    labels = c(`FALSE` = "Not Significant", `TRUE` = "Significant"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  # scale_color_jama() +
  scale_color_jama(name = "Predictor Category") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Beta (95% CI)",
    y = "Predictor",
    title = "Model: Biomarker ~ Demographics + CRS + APOE + Family History",
    subtitle = "High GRS tertile"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, angle = 0, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )
plot1
ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, "PREVENTAD_model5_highgrs.png"), 
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```


# Residuals plot
```{r}
model_data <- grs_preventad %>%
  filter(model == "model5") %>%
  filter(grs_group == "High GRS") %>%
  mutate(
    residuals = map(res, residuals),
    fitted = map(res, fitted)
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, residuals, fitted) %>%
  unnest(c(residuals, fitted))
  
# Histogram
p_hist <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = residuals)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Residuals",
       x = "Residuals", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
  
# Q-Q plot
p_qq <- ggplot(model_data, aes(sample = residuals)) +
  stat_qq(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
  stat_qq_line(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Q-Q Plot",
       x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )
  
# Residuals vs Fitted
p_fitted <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residuals)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8, method = "loess") +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted Values",
       x = "Fitted Values", y = "Residuals") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  )

# Stack vertically
combined <- p_hist / p_qq / p_fitted +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Model: Biomarker ~ Demographics + Genetics + Family History + CRS",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save
ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$stratified, "PREVENTAD_diagnostics_model5_highgrs.png"), 
       combined, width = 14, height = 14, dpi = 300)
```
